title: Warning Sign "axe"
description: If you want to turn your axe into a warning sign, then this set of resources is for you !
body: If you want to turn your axe into a warning sign, then this set of resources is for you !      _**To get a warning sign, just rename the axe to "Sign".**_ ! ![On the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb82cf09bee5ab622cd81f26a8c4a1b0532f4c1.jpeg)
